name: @delosis/otel-bootstrap
description: Delosis-standard OpenTelemetry bootstrap for Azure Functions (Node.js v4). Auto-instruments @azure/cosmos, outbound HTTP(S), and other Node libraries; exports traces via OTLP to the Tempo endpoint configured via OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_TRACES_ENDPOINT (or generic OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT). Designed to be required exactly once from src/index.js before any function code loads.
